title: Mamquam River FSR
coordinate_source: Trailforks Mamquam FSR trailhead coordinates
summary_zh: 公开 FB 帖子把 Mamquam 讨论成经典 Squamish 主线：有人问 Indian River / Mamquam 是否关闭，也有人反馈雪和冰对通行影响很大。它属于典型主线好走、支线更有挑战的区域。
notes: FB public post + Trailforks trailhead coordinates
card_blurb: Squamish route with a balanced off-road feel, good for planning a local trip with friends.
vehicle_recommendation: AWD or 4x4 recommended; avoid low-clearance vehicles.
route_condition_note: Expect typical FSR conditions: gravel, potholes, mud after rain, and changing access through the season.

card_blurb: Squamish route with a balanced off-road feel, good for planning a local trip with friends.

route_condition_note: Expect typical FSR conditions: gravel, potholes, mud after rain, and changing access through the season.

title: Mount Cheam Peak Trailhead
coordinate_source: User-provided trailhead coordinates / BC backroad knowledge
summary_zh: Mount Cheam Peak 是 Chilliwack / Fraser Valley 地区非常著名的山景目的地。通往 trailhead 的 FSR 路况较差，适合 4x4 high-clearance 车辆。到达 trailhead 后可徒步登顶，欣赏开阔的高山草甸景色。这条路线对 Offroady 来说很适合，因为结合了越野驾驶和徒步登山的双重体验。
notes: Manual addition by request on 2026-04-29. Distinct from the existing mount-cheam-fsr-access entry (FSR approach at lower elevation). This is the actual trailhead parking area from which the hiking route to Cheam Peak begins.
card_blurb: A classic Fraser Valley mountain destination where a rough 4x4 access road leads to the Mount Cheam Peak trailhead, with the option to hike onward for panoramic alpine views.
vehicle_recommendation: 4x4 high-clearance vehicle strongly recommended. Low-clearance vehicles should not attempt this road. Snow, washouts, loose rock, and narrow sections may be present.
route_condition_note: Road conditions vary significantly by season and recent weather. High-clearance 4x4 required. Check current road and trail conditions before going. Snow may persist into late spring. Hiking beyond the trailhead requires proper footwear, water, weather protection, and backcountry preparation.
